name: extract-content-array
description: Extract text from content arrays like [{type:'text', text:'...'}] used in Claude/OpenAI message formats

input.description: Object containing a content array at the specified path

path.description: Dot-separated path to the content array (e.g., 'message.content')

separator.description: String to join multiple text items (default: newline)

output.description: Extracted text string joined by separator, or null if path doesn't exist or isn't a valid content array

examples.description: Extract text from simple content array
Extract and join multiple text items
